description: Hide rblocks from visualization without deleting them from the model.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock hide ...') via command interface

keywords.name: adummy
keywords.description: If a boolean type is specified, then if on it hides all rigid blocks in the range. If off it un-hides (or shows) all rigid blocks in the range, and the use-hidden keyword is applied to the range implicitly. on is the default if no keyword is given.

keywords.name: undo
keywords.description: This will reverse the operation of the last rblock hide command. A maximum undo stack of size 12 is retained.
